explanation: The user asks to use another bowl, implying a replacement of the currently used bowl (bowl_0) which is dirty. Since the robot is not currently holding any object, it must first find another bowl (bowl_1) from the environment, which is likely available in the kitchen or fridge based on the discussed objects.
